ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the driver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Racing license number of the driver */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of racing experience */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "co_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-driver (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota, Ford) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Celica ST205) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of the vehicle (linked to vehicles_classes table) */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kg */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Unique chassis number for the vehicle */,
  "registered_owner" TEXT /* Name of the registered owner of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES vehicles_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race event */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., Grand Prix) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race is held */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., endurance, sprint) */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the race track in kilometers */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "race_director" TEXT /* Name of the race director */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race in which the entry is made */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver making the entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being used in the entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry submission */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., confirmed, pending, rejected) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the entry */,
  "entry_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing class (e.g., Rally, Formula) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racing class */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum allowed speed for the class */,
  "min_engine_capacity" REAL /* Minimum engine capacity for the class */,
  "max_engine_capacity" REAL /* Maximum engine capacity for the class */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the class */,
  "regulation_link" TEXT /* Link to the official regulations for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entries table linking to specific races */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time recorded for the vehicle during the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the vehicle in the race */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned based on performance in the race */,
  "best_lap_time" REAL /* Best lap time recorded for the vehicle during the race */,
  "average_lap_time" REAL /* Average lap time recorded for the vehicle during the race */,
  "total_laps_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of laps completed in the race */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the race */,
  "speed_variance" REAL /* Variance in speed throughout the race */,
  "tyre_wear" REAL /* Tyre wear during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing team */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the racing team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the racing team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the primary sponsor of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_drivers" (
  "team_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-driver association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which driver belongs */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver in the association */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the driver left the team (if applicable) */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the driver within the team (e.g., main driver, co-driver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_drivers_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, driver) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
